short_term_debt.description: Short-term debt / current portion of long-term debt

discontinued_operations.description: Income/loss from discontinued operations, net of tax

other_comprehensive_income.description: Other comprehensive income/loss, net of tax

prepaid_expenses.description: Prepaid expenses and other current assets

net_change_in_cash.description: Net increase/decrease in cash and equivalents

tangible_book_value.description: Tangible book value (derived: equity - goodwill - intangibles)

book_value_per_share.description: Book value per share (derived: equity / shares_outstanding)

fcf_per_share.description: Free cash flow per share (derived: FCF / shares_outstanding)

asset_impairment_pct.description: Asset impairment charges as % of total assets (derived: asset_impairment_charges / total_assets * 100)

goodwill_to_assets_pct.description: Goodwill as % of total assets (derived: goodwill / total_assets * 100)

rou_asset_pct.description: ROU asset as % of total assets (derived: right_of_use_asset / total_assets * 100)

operating_lease_burden.description: Operating lease liabilities as % of total assets (derived: operating_lease_liabilities / total_assets * 100)

sbc_dilution_pct.description: Stock-based compensation as % of revenue (derived: stock_based_compensation / revenue * 100)

contract_liability_pct.description: Contract liability as % of revenue (derived: contract_with_customer_liability / revenue * 100)

derivative_fair_value_pct.description: Net derivative fair value as % of total assets (derived: (derivative_assets - derivative_liabilities) / total_assets * 100)

derivative_notional_pct.description: Derivative notional amount as % of total assets (derived: derivative_notional_amount / total_assets * 100)

warranty_reserve_pct.description: Product warranty reserve as % of revenue (derived: product_warranty_accrual / revenue * 100)

proceeds_from_sale_of_business.description: Proceeds from sale / divestiture of businesses

effect_of_exchange_rate.description: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash

federal_tax_current.description: Current federal income tax expense / benefit

state_tax_current.description: Current state and local income tax expense / benefit

foreign_tax_current.description: Current foreign income tax expense / benefit

federal_tax_deferred.description: Deferred federal income tax expense / benefit

state_tax_deferred.description: Deferred state and local income tax expense / benefit

foreign_tax_deferred.description: Deferred foreign income tax expense / benefit

credit_facility_max.description: Maximum borrowing capacity under credit facility

rsu_grants.description: RSU / restricted stock units granted in period

unvested_sbc_cost.description: Unrecognized stock-based compensation cost for unvested awards

ecd_ceo_total_comp.description: CEO (PEO) total compensation from Pay-vs-Performance table

ecd_peer_group_tsr.description: Peer group total shareholder return (indexed to $100)

ecd_insider_trading_policy.description: Whether insider trading policies and procedures have been adopted

ecd_award_timing_mnpi.description: Whether award timing considers material non-public information

ecd_award_timing_predetermined.description: Whether equity awards follow a predetermined schedule

ecd_ceo_name.description: Principal Executive Officer (CEO) name from ECD disclosure

intangible_asset_impairment.description: Impairment of intangible assets (finite-lived and indefinite-lived)

severance_costs.description: Severance costs from restructuring or workforce reductions

loss_contingency_accrual.description: Loss contingency accrual at carrying amount

litigation_settlement.description: Litigation settlement amounts paid or awarded

rsu_grants_in_period.description: RSU/restricted stock units granted in period

unvested_sbc_cost.description: Unvested stock-based compensation cost not yet recognized

contract_with_customer_liability.description: Contract with customer liability (total deferred revenue under ASC 606)
